pi_items.source: Task description line 5 specifies saving to this path
Task description explicitly states 'plane 60 mm above (Z = 60 mm)'
Task description explicitly states 'circular profile (40 mm diameter, centered at origin)'
Task description explicitly states 'square profile (30 mm x 30 mm, centered at origin)'

Analytical calculation of loft from 40mm diameter circle to 30x30mm square over 60mm height yields ~64,700 mm³, which falls within claimed range. However, cannot definitively verify exact bounds without running FreeCAD. No external data source references this value.

Analytical calculation of loft from 40mm diameter circle to 30x30mm square over 60mm height yields ~64,700 mm³, which falls within claimed range. However, cannot definitively verify exact bounds without running FreeCAD. No external data source references this value.
Not mentioned in task description. Value of 5.0mm is reasonable for geometry with 40mm and 30mm features (~12.5% tolerance), but cannot be independently verified.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic FreeCAD model—an Additive Loft transitioning from a circular profile (40 mm diameter) on the XY plane to a square profile (30 mm × 30 mm) on a plane 60 mm above (Z = 60 mm). All spatial dimensions (height: 60.0 mm, circle diameter: 40.0 mm, square side: 30.0 mm) are verified against the task description. The output is saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/loft_transition.FCStd. Volume bounds (45000–85000 mm³) are plausible based on analytical estimates (~64,700 mm³ for linear interpolation) but cannot be independently verified without FreeCAD execution. The bounding box tolerance of 5.0 mm is reasonable but not explicitly specified in task description.
